HOME.TITLE: Welcome to SayHello
HOME.DESC: A simple text-based chat platform. Enter without registration, just type your name and start chatting!
HOME.ERROR_MINLENGTH: Name must be at least 3 characters
HOME.ERROR_MAXLENGTH: Name must be at most 20 characters
HOME.ERROR_PATTERN: Name can contain letters only, with a single space between words
HOME.ERROR_SERVER: Failed to start chat. Try again later
HOME.CHOOSE_MODE: How do you want to chat?

HOME.TEXT_CHAT_DESC: Send and receive text messages instantly
HOME.FEATURES_DESC: A simple, fast, and secure platform to meet new people with ease
HOME.HOW_DESC: Start chatting in seconds with no complications
HOME.STEP1_DESC: No registration or email, just your name
HOME.STEP2_DESC: Text or video, whatever you prefer
HOME.STEP3_DESC: We instantly match you with a random stranger
HOME.STEP4_DESC: Not feeling the chat? Hit next and try someone else
HOME.TRUST_TITLE: Your Chats Are Safe With Us
HOME.TRUST_DESC: We fully protect your privacy. We never store your chats or share your data with any third party.
HOME.TRUST_ANON_DESC: No registration or email. Speak freely.
HOME.TRUST_ENC_DESC: Chats are encrypted between users to ensure confidentiality.
HOME.TRUST_NODATA_DESC: We do not keep any record of your chats after the session ends.
HOME.TRUST_MSG2: I'm good thanks! Where are you from?
HOME.CTA_DESC: Join thousands of users now and start a fun chat in seconds.
HOME.VIDEO_SECTION_DESC: Watch a quick overview of the platform and discover how easy it is to connect
HOME.ABOUT_TEASER_DESC: SayHello was built by a passionate developer who believes in free, private communication for everyone.

ONE.TITLE: Quick Communication
ONE.DESC: Start instant conversations with other users.

TWO.TITLE: Meet Others

TWO.DETAIL1: Users from all over the world.

THREE.TITLE: Security & Privacy
THREE.DESC: Enjoy a safe and protected chat experience.
THREE.DETAIL1: Your personal information is not shared.
THREE.DETAIL2: Your communication with the partner is encrypted for confidentiality.
THREE.DETAIL3: Chat freely with peace of mind.

ABOUT.HERO_DESC: We believe human connection should be simple, free, and private. No accounts, no tracking — just real conversations.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC: To provide a frictionless, anonymous platform where anyone in the world can connect with someone new in seconds, without ever creating an account or sharing personal data.
ABOUT.STORY_P1: SayHello was born from a simple question: why does connecting with someone new online require so much friction? Sign-ups, email verification, profiles — all barriers to a simple conversation.
ABOUT.STORY_P2: We built SayHello to remove those barriers entirely. Just enter your name, choose how you want to chat, and you're instantly connected with someone new from anywhere in the world.
ABOUT.STORY_P3: Privacy isn't a feature for us — it's the foundation. We don't store messages, don't track users, and don't sell data. When your chat session ends, it's gone forever.
ABOUT.VALUES_DESC: These principles guide every decision we make at SayHello
ABOUT.VAL1_DESC: No accounts, no logs, no tracking. Your identity stays yours.
ABOUT.VAL2_DESC: From landing to chatting in under 10 seconds. No friction.
ABOUT.VAL3_DESC: Connect with people from 50+ countries around the world.
ABOUT.VAL4_DESC: All communications are encrypted end-to-end between users.
ABOUT.VAL5_DESC: We believe meaningful conversations change lives.
ABOUT.VAL6_DESC: Core features will always be free for everyone, always.
ABOUT.CREATOR_BIO: A passionate full-stack developer from Egypt who built SayHello from scratch. I love creating tools that make people's lives simpler and more connected. SayHello is my vision for what anonymous chat should feel like.
ABOUT.CTA_DESC: Join thousands of users and start a new conversation today.

PRIVACY.HERO_DESC: We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This policy explains what we collect, why, and how we protect it.
PRIVACY.SUM1_DESC: No account or email required. You stay anonymous.
PRIVACY.SUM2_DESC: Chat messages are never stored on our servers.
PRIVACY.SUM4_DESC: We never sell or share your data with third parties.
PRIVACY.S1_P1: SayHello is designed to be minimally invasive. We collect only the information strictly necessary to provide the service.
PRIVACY.S1_P2: We collect: the display name you enter (not verified or stored permanently), temporary session tokens to maintain your chat connection, and basic technical data like IP address and browser type for security purposes.
PRIVACY.S2_P1: The minimal data we collect is used exclusively to operate the service:
PRIVACY.S2_I1: Your name is used only to display in the current chat session
PRIVACY.S2_I2: Session tokens are used to maintain your connection and are deleted when the session ends
PRIVACY.S2_I3: Technical data is used to prevent abuse and maintain platform security
PRIVACY.S2_I4: We never use your data for advertising or marketing purposes
PRIVACY.S3_P1: SayHello does not store your chat messages. All messages are transmitted in real-time between users and are immediately discarded once delivered. No conversation history is kept on our servers.
PRIVACY.S3_HIGHLIGHT: When your chat session ends, all associated data — including your name and session token — is permanently deleted from our systems.
PRIVACY.S4_P1: Even with minimal data collection, you retain full rights over your information:
PRIVACY.S4_I1: Right to know what data we hold about you
PRIVACY.S4_I2: Right to request deletion of any data
PRIVACY.S4_I3: Right to opt out of any data collection beyond what is strictly necessary
PRIVACY.S5_P1: SayHello uses only essential cookies required for the service to function. We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies.
PRIVACY.S5_WARNING: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any third-party tracking scripts that monitor your behavior across websites.
PRIVACY.S6_P1: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with any third-party companies for their commercial purposes.
PRIVACY.S6_P2: Our infrastructure providers may process technical data as part of operating the service, but are contractually bound to treat this data with strict confidentiality.
PRIVACY.S7_P1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by updating the date at the top of this page. Continued use of SayHello after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
PRIVACY.CONTACT_DESC: If you have questions or concerns about this privacy policy or your data, you can contact us at: privacy@sayhello.app

CHAT.TITLE: Chat Room
CHAT.WAITING: No partner connected yet. Please wait...
CHAT.PARTNER_LEFT: Your partner has left the chat.
CHAT.WELCOME2: Get ready to meet new friends!

CHAT.browser: Voice recording is not supported on this browser
CHAT.VOICE_NO_PARTNER: You cannot record a voice message without a partner
CHAT.EMOJI_NO_PARTNER: You cannot use emojis without a partner
CHAT.message_NO_PARTNER: You cannot send a message without a partner
CHAT.empty_message: You cannot send an empty message
CHAT.RECORD_CANCELED: Recording was canceled because the other user left the chat

VIDEOCALL.TITLE: Video Call
VIDEOCALL.WELCOME_DESC: Connect face-to-face with someone new. Camera and microphone access is required.
